proven.claim: PROVEN: byFile map correctly groups contracts by file path
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P6
; LINE: 450
; PROVEN: byFile map correctly groups contracts by file path
(declare-const file_a_contracts Int)
(declare-const file_b_contracts Int)
(declare-const file_a_proven Int)
(declare-const file_a_violations Int)
(declare-const file_a_unverified Int)
(declare-const file_a_signals Int)
(declare-const total_signals Int)
(assert (= file_a_contracts 3))
(assert (= file_b_contracts 2))
(assert (= file_a_proven 4))
(assert (= file_a_violations 1))
(assert (= file_a_unverified (- 3 4 1)))
(assert (= file_a_signals 3))
(assert (= total_signals (+ 3 2)))
(assert (= total_signals 5))
(assert (= file_a_signals file_a_contracts))
(assert (not (= file_a_signals file_a_contracts)))
(check-sat)
; unsat → byFile.signals equals actual contract count per file

proven.claim: PROVEN: sorted order is by violations descending (violations - b.violations)
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P6
; LINE: 450
; PROVEN: sorted order is by violations descending (violations - b.violations)
(declare-const a_violations Int)
(declare-const b_violations Int)
(declare-const sorted_before_b Bool)
(assert (= a_violations 5))
(assert (= b_violations 2))
(assert (= sorted_before_b (> a_violations b_violations)))
(assert (not (= sorted_before_b (> a_violations b_violations))))
(check-sat)
; unsat → sorting correctly orders by violations count descending
